LACE V

Pattern reading machine

A pattern reading machine
for your specific needs.

Your input. Its read. Your map.

Pick your domain How it works

How it works

01

Your input

Set a baseline — where things stand right now. Add to it over time. The more honestly you put in, the more clearly it reads back.

02

The machine reads

It works through your material. It counts what appears independently. It finds what is consistent, what conflicts, what is building, and what is absent. It does not generate, guess, or fill gaps.

03

Your output

A map of what it found — bounded entirely by what you wrote. Every claim carries a confidence label. Nothing is invented. Nothing is added.

04

You stay in control

If the map misreads something, you correct it. Corrections govern every subsequent reading. The machine does not override you.

What it reads

The same reading engine works across any domain where something is moving, stuck, or under load. Pick the cartridge for your context — each one carries the domain knowledge specific to that situation.

ReentryFinancialLegalMedicalGriefRelationshipsMental healthAddiction recoveryEngineeringTeam dynamicsEmploymentCreativeEducationCriminal justiceLab evidenceRoboticsAsset integrityBattery transitionCode releaseProcurementGame / narrativeAI agent

What this is — and isn't

It is

A reading and sorting tool

It is not

An AI generating responses

It is

Evidence-bound — reads only what you put in

It is not

A scoring or assessment tool

It is

Private — nothing leaves your device

It is not

A decision-maker — you stay in control

It is

A single file — no account, no server

It is not

A substitute for your own judgement
